languages.text: "Понимание священного таинства технологии — путь, которому может следовать не каждый".
"Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."
languages.original_text: "Понимание священного таинства технологии — путь, которому может следовать не каждый".

traits.locale_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."
"Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."
"Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

languages.text: “并不是所有人都有资格踏上理解科技神圣奥秘的道路。”
languages.original_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

traits.locale_text: “并不是所有人都有资格踏上理解科技神圣奥秘的道路。”

languages.text: « La compréhension du mystère sacré de la technologie est une voie qu'il n'est pas donné à tous de suivre. »
languages.original_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

traits.locale_text: « La compréhension du mystère sacré de la technologie est une voie qu'il n'est pas donné à tous de suivre. »

languages.text: "Teknolojinin kutsal gizeminin idraki, herkesin izleyebileceği bir yol değildir."
languages.original_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

traits.locale_text: "Teknolojinin kutsal gizeminin idraki, herkesin izleyebileceği bir yol değildir."

languages.text: «La comprensión del sagrado misterio de la tecnología no es un camino apto para todos».
languages.original_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

traits.locale_text: «La comprensión del sagrado misterio de la tecnología no es un camino apto para todos».

languages.text: "Das Verständnis der heiligen Mysterien der Technologie ist ein Weg, dem nicht alle folgen können."
languages.original_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

traits.locale_text: "Das Verständnis der heiligen Mysterien der Technologie ist ein Weg, dem nicht alle folgen können."

languages.text: 「技術の神秘を理解することは、誰でもできる道ではない」
languages.original_text: "Comprehension of the sacred mystery of technology is a path that not all can follow."

traits.locale_text: 「技術の神秘を理解することは、誰でもできる道ではない」
